articles.title: NVIDIA and Coherent Announce Strategic Partnership to Develop Optics Technology to Scale Next-Generation Data Center Architecture - NVIDIA Newsroom
articles.description: NVIDIA and Coherent Corp. (NYSE: COHR) today announced a multiyear strategic agreement to advance the frontier of advanced optics technologies, including manufacturing capacity and research and development, to enable next-generation AI infrastructure.
articles.content: About CoherentCoherent is the global photonics leader. We harness photons to drive innovation. Industry leaders in the datacenter, communications, and industrial markets rely on Coherent’s world-lead… [+6011 chars]
